---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken — installation, lint, scripts, or CI
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include error messages, exit codes, or unexpected output).

## Environment

| | |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04 |
| Shell | e.g. zsh, bash |
| Claude Code version | `claude --version` |
| Python version | `python3 --version` |

## Additional context

Any other relevant information (config files, symlink state, etc.).
